shrubland_rich.rationale: 78% Shrubland + 22% Forest. Hard spectral boundary (both vegetated) where SAR structural information should help fusion models draw a sharper class boundary than S2-only.

wetlands_heavy.rationale: 78% Wetlands + 10% Water + 8% Forest. Universal failure mode on the test set.

urban_water_mix.rationale: 48% Water + 45% Urban + 3% Wetlands. Saturated easy case where all four models perform similarly.
